findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@0.6.0 (npm) is affected by CVE-2025-66414: Model Context Protocol (MCP) TypeScript SDK does not enable DNS rebinding protection by default; fixed in 1.24.0

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: mysql2@3.9.0 (npm) is affected by CVE-2024-21509: mysql2 vulnerable to Prototype Poisoning; fixed in 3.9.4

findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: zod@3.22.0 (npm) is affected by CVE-2023-4316: Zod denial of service vulnerability; fixed in 3.22.3

findings.title: SQL query built from template interpolation
findings.description: SQL query built from template interpolation detected in JavaScript/TypeScript source
